2025-26 La Salle Explorers Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season

Record: 9-23 (5-13, 11th in A-10 MBB)

Coach: Darris Nichols

PS/G: 67.1 (342nd of 365)

PA/G: 74.1 (186th of 365)

SRS: -4.21 (207th of 365)

SOS: 3.89 (99th of 365)

ORtg: 100.9 (332nd of 365)

DRtg: 111.3 (296th of 365)
